3259130.name: Mexico, 1921. A Deep Slumber OST
3259130.description:
Mexico, 1921. A Deep Slumber is an intriguing narrative adventure where you try to solve a hundred-year-old mystery: who planned the assassination of President Álvaro Obregón? You play as Juan Aguirre, a photojournalist who will interview and photograph subjects, collect historical data and report the news that will shape Mexican history. Join Juan in post-revolutionary Mexico City to discover why Mexico ain't no place for the weak.

Mexico 1921: A Deep Slumber, features a vibrant soundtrack by composers Mike Fortu and Carlos Ramirez. Drawing from Mexico's rich musical history, it blends traditional elements with modern sounds, encapsulating post-revolutionary Mexico across 21 tracks and offering a fresh take on its cultural identity.
